title: Delicate Earthy French Gobo Burdock Gratin
description: A festive French dish featuring gobo burdock, this gratin is earthy and fluffy, perfect for a special occasion, and is egg-free-friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the sliced gobo burdock, olive oil, chopped onion, and minced garlic, and toss to coat.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, vegetable broth, nutritional yeast, salt, and black pepper.
Add the wet ingredients to the bowl with the gobo burdock mixture, and toss to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish, and top with chopped fresh thyme.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil, and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil, and continue baking for an additional 20 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
Remove the dish from the oven, and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
